questionHtml: State and explain the effect on the rate of reaction if ethanoic acid of the same concentration is used in place of hydrochloric acid.
markschemeHtml:
rate decreases

OR

slower reaction

 

«ethanoic acid» partially dissociated/ionized «in solution/water»

OR

lower [H+]

 

Accept “weak acid” or “higher pH”.

[2 marks]

meta.title: State and explain the effect on the rate of reaction if ethanoic acid of the same concentration is used in place of hydrochloric acid.
